---
created: "2026-03-22T00:00:00Z"
id: task-sv0c-error-reporting
key: sv0c-error-reporting
state: done
tags:
    - sv0
    - sv0c
    - errors
title: "sv0c error reporting infrastructure"
type: task
---

# sv0c error reporting infrastructure

## purpose

implement the error reporting infrastructure that all compiler passes use.
this is built first because every pass needs source span tracking and
formatted error output from the start.

the error system provides:
- source span tracking (file, line, column, length) through every pass
- highlighted code snippets in error messages
- error recovery support (continue after errors to report multiple issues)
- structured error types with error codes (E0100 for parsing, E0200 for
  name resolution, E0300 for type errors, E0400 for contract errors)

## dependencies

/require: sml

## configuration

/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SRC_DIR=sv0c/src

## implementation

### step 1: source span type

/ai: implement the source span module in SML/NJ for sv0c.

     create src/error/span.sml with:

     signature SPAN = sig
       type pos = {line: int, col: int, offset: int}
       type span = {file: string, start: pos, stop: pos}
       val dummy : span
       val merge : span -> span -> span
       val toString : span -> string
     end

     structure Span :> SPAN = struct
       (* implementation *)
     end

     the span tracks file path, start position (line, column, byte offset),
     and end position. merge combines two spans into the smallest span
     that contains both. toString produces "file:line:col" format.

/run: 01-implement-spans.sh

### step 2: error reporter

/ai: implement the error reporter in SML/NJ for sv0c.

     create src/error/reporter.sml with:

     datatype severity = Error | Warning | Note
     datatype error = CompilerError of {
       code: string,       (* "E0102", "W0001", etc. *)
       severity: severity,
       message: string,
       span: Span.span,
       related: (string * Span.span) list,  (* "first defined here", etc. *)
       help: string list   (* suggestions *)
     }

     the reporter should:
     - accumulate errors without aborting (for multi-error reporting)
     - format errors with source snippets (reads the source file)
     - highlight the span within the source line
     - include help text and related locations
     - sort errors by file and line number for output

     match the error format from the design document:
       error[E0301]: narrowing cast may overflow
         --> src/main.sv0:12:18
          |
       12 |     let z: u8 = x as u8;
          |                  ^^^^^^^ u32 -> u8 requires x <= 255
          |
          = help: use .truncate() for intentional wrapping

/run: 02-implement-reporter.sh

### step 3: CM integration

/ai: create the sources.cm file for the error module and verify it
     compiles independently.

/run: 03-test-errors.sh

## validation

/assert: test -f $SRC_DIR/error/span.sml
/assert: test -f $SRC_DIR/error/reporter.sml
